reference_scope: aMule TickDownload, DOWNLOADTIMEOUT, cancel, and block request behavior
acceptance: Current request windows, timeout, cancel, and requested-range cleanup are documented.
verification: Focused source inspection covered aMule DownloadClient timeout/cancel paths and current aria2-next request, part-data, SegmentMan, and retry ownership.
notes: Public zero-byte symptoms stayed context only; no public ED2K download gate was used.

reference_scope: aMule block request pacing; aria2 SegmentMan ownership
acceptance: Request ranges are selected and refreshed without over-requesting, starving, or holding stale ranges.
verification: cmake --build --preset default --target aria2_tests passed; focused piece-policy and requested-range cleanup tests passed.
notes: Disk safety stayed in PieceStorage and Ed2kPeerTransfer.

reference_scope: aMule cancel transfer and retry state
acceptance: Stalled peers release requested ranges, send cancel when appropriate, and re-enter queue or retry state without blocking other peers.
verification: Focused stalled-transfer expiry test passed and verified requested-range cleanup, SegmentMan cancellation, cancel state, and bounded retry time.
notes: The peer remains in retry backoff before it can be scheduled again, avoiding busy reconnect loops.

reference_scope: aMule corrupt data and failed source handling
acceptance: Bad packets, corrupt data, disconnects, and no-progress peers produce bounded retry state and preserve valid disk data.
verification: Focused duplicate-data and AICH recovery transfer regressions passed alongside the new stall expiry tests.
notes: Existing MD4/AICH disk verification remains the corruption boundary.
